title: Attention Is All You Need
author: Vaswani et al.
notes: The foundational transformer paper. Key insight: self-attention can replace recurrence entirely.

title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
author: Devlin et al.
notes: The BERT paper. Key insight: pre-training a model on a large corpus of text and then fine-tuning it on a specific task.

title: GRE Pre Plus 2024
author: ETS
notes: Currently on GRE Pre Plus 2024. Excellent reference for GRE preparation.
